component.name: flow-globe
component.title: Flow Globe
component.summary: Animated geospatial flows as glowing arcs on a rotating 3D globe or flat map.
component.description: A dependency-free, first-party visualization of country-to-country flows. Renders great-circle arcs with travelling particles over a rotating wireframe globe or an equirectangular map. Drag to rotate, switch projections, and supply your own flow data and node roles. No third-party charting runtime.

stories.title: Ocean globe
stories.summary: Default ocean theme with demo flows on a rotating globe.

stories.title: Custom flows with roles
stories.summary: Explicit source/hub/destination roles, custom flow data, and country names.
stories.html:
<flow-globe
  title="Design System Adoption"
  subtitle="Component imports by region"
  theme="ocean"
  producers="US,IN"
  hubs="DE,SG"
  consumers="GB,FR,JP,AU"
  data='[{"sourceId":"US","targetId":"DE","value":120},{"sourceId":"IN","targetId":"SG","value":90},{"sourceId":"DE","targetId":"GB","value":70},{"sourceId":"SG","targetId":"JP","value":50},{"sourceId":"SG","targetId":"AU","value":40}]'
  country-names='{"SG":"Singapore","AU":"Australia"}'
></flow-globe>

stories.title: Slate map projection
stories.summary: Flat equirectangular map with the slate theme and legend.
stories.html: <flow-globe title="Global Supply Chain" theme="slate" projection="map" height="420px"></flow-globe>

stories.title: Coffee, no controls
stories.summary: Coffee theme with auto-rotate, controls, and legend all disabled.

stories.title: Ember with arc override
stories.summary: Compact ember globe with a custom arc color via CSS custom property.

snippets.title: Replace flow data programmatically

attributes.name: title
attributes.description: Display title shown at the top of the globe.

attributes.name: subtitle
attributes.description: Display subtitle shown below the title.

attributes.name: theme
attributes.description: Color palette for the globe, arcs, and nodes.

attributes.name: height
attributes.description: Wrapper height as any CSS length.

attributes.name: projection
attributes.description: Render mode: orthographic globe or flat equirectangular map.

attributes.name: auto-rotate
attributes.description: Continuous auto-rotation. Drag-to-rotate still works when false.

attributes.name: data
attributes.description: Flow array of { sourceId, targetId, value } using ISO-3166 alpha-2 country codes.

attributes.name: country-names
attributes.description: Object mapping country IDs to custom display names.

attributes.name: producers
attributes.description: Country codes to color as source nodes.

attributes.name: hubs
attributes.description: Country codes to color as intermediate/hub nodes.

attributes.name: consumers
attributes.description: Country codes to color as destination nodes.

methods.name: setData
methods.description: Replace the flow data and re-render.

methods.name: configure
methods.description: Apply multiple options (attributes, data, countryNames) at once; returns the element for chaining.
